title: Generation Package
description: Phase 2 Plan artefact: the only payload that enters codegen-LLM. References siteBrief and sitePlan by relative path inside the run directory. Locked by ADR 0013 before Sprint 2B wires planningModel.

runId.description: Engine Run identifier the package belongs to.

policyVersions.description: Map of policy short-name to policy version pin (e.g. {'engineRun': 'engine-run.v1'}). Codegen reads this to know which policy generation it should obey.

siteBriefRef.description: Filename reference inside the run directory pointing to the Site Brief artefact. Always 'site-brief.json' in canonical runs.

sitePlanRef.description: Filename reference inside the run directory pointing to the Site Plan artefact. Always 'site-plan.json' in canonical runs.

scaffoldId.description: Mirror of sitePlan.scaffoldId, denormalised for codegen convenience.

language.description: Mirror of siteBrief.language. Locked here so codegen does not have to read the brief file just to pick a language.

engineMode.description: Whether this run creates Project DNA (init) or patches inside existing DNA (followup).

projectId.description: Required when engineMode is 'followup'; null on init.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the package was written.

contentBlocks.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton, see docs/heavy-llm-flow/01). Per-section copy keyed by '<routeId>.<sectionId>' (same addressing as sectionPlan). Values are free-form objects (e.g. hero with headline/subheadline) or arrays (e.g. a service list). No model fills it in kor-1a; planning fills it in kor-1c, renderer consumes it in kor-2.

additionalProperties.description: Section content: an object of fields or an array of items. Internal shape is intentionally open in the kor-1a skeleton.

visualDirection.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton). Visual direction for the site. heroStyle and sectionTreatments are kept as free strings here; kor-3b tightens them to enums that map to variant tokens and dispatcher treatments. No model fills it in kor-1a.

heroStyle.description: Hero layout hint (e.g. 'split_with_image'). Tightened to an enum in kor-3b.

sectionTreatments.description: Map of sectionId to a treatment hint string. Tightened to enums in kor-3b.

imageBriefs.description: Natural-language briefs for any imagery the site needs.

qualityRisks.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton). Honesty/quality guardrails the renderer and verifier must respect (e.g. 'No fake certifications', 'Do not show phone if missing'). No model fills it in kor-1a; planning fills it in kor-1c.
